module_info.docstring:
CLI Mail Commands Tests.

Tests for mail-related CLI subcommands:
- mail status: Routing diagnostics
- acks pending: List pending acknowledgements
- acks remind: Highlight old acknowledgements
- acks overdue: List overdue acknowledgements
- list-acks: List ack-required messages

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-n6z

functions.name: seed_project_with_agents
functions.docstring: Create a project with two agents for message exchange.

functions.name: seed_message_with_ack
functions.docstring: Create a message with optional acknowledgement state.

functions.name: test_mail_status_basic
functions.docstring: mail status command runs and shows routing info.

functions.name: test_mail_status_with_git_repo
functions.docstring: mail status shows git-related info when in a git repo.

functions.name: test_mail_status_shows_identity_mode
functions.docstring: mail status displays PROJECT_IDENTITY_MODE setting.

functions.name: test_acks_pending_no_messages
functions.docstring: acks pending shows empty table when no pending acks.

functions.name: test_acks_pending_with_pending_message
functions.docstring: acks pending shows messages requiring acknowledgement.

functions.name: test_acks_pending_excludes_acknowledged
functions.docstring: acks pending excludes already acknowledged messages.

functions.name: test_acks_pending_respects_limit
functions.docstring: acks pending respects the --limit option.

functions.name: test_acks_pending_invalid_project
functions.docstring: acks pending fails gracefully with invalid project.

functions.name: test_acks_pending_invalid_agent
functions.docstring: acks pending fails gracefully with invalid agent.

functions.name: test_acks_remind_no_old_messages
functions.docstring: acks remind shows success message when no old pending acks.

functions.name: test_acks_remind_shows_old_messages
functions.docstring: acks remind shows messages older than threshold.

functions.name: test_acks_remind_default_threshold
functions.docstring: acks remind uses default 30 minute threshold.

functions.name: test_acks_remind_respects_limit
functions.docstring: acks remind respects the --limit option.

functions.name: test_acks_overdue_no_overdue_messages
functions.docstring: acks overdue shows empty table when no overdue acks.

functions.name: test_acks_overdue_shows_overdue_messages
functions.docstring: acks overdue shows messages older than TTL.

functions.name: test_acks_overdue_default_ttl
functions.docstring: acks overdue uses default 60 minute TTL.

functions.name: test_acks_overdue_excludes_acknowledged
functions.docstring: acks overdue excludes acknowledged messages even if old.

functions.name: test_list_acks_no_pending
functions.docstring: list-acks shows empty table when no pending acks.

functions.name: test_list_acks_shows_pending
functions.docstring: list-acks shows messages requiring acknowledgement.

functions.name: test_list_acks_excludes_non_ack_required
functions.docstring: list-acks excludes messages that don't require ack.

functions.name: test_list_acks_excludes_acknowledged
functions.docstring: list-acks excludes already acknowledged messages.

functions.name: test_list_acks_respects_limit
functions.docstring: list-acks respects the --limit option.

functions.name: test_list_acks_invalid_project
functions.docstring: list-acks fails gracefully with invalid project.

functions.name: test_list_acks_invalid_agent
functions.docstring: list-acks fails gracefully with invalid agent.

functions.name: test_list_acks_by_slug
functions.docstring: list-acks works with project slug instead of human_key.

functions.name: test_acks_pending_shows_message_details
functions.docstring: acks pending shows thread ID, kind, and timestamps.

functions.name: test_acks_remind_read_status_indicator
functions.docstring: acks remind shows read status for each message.

functions.name: test_multiple_recipients_handled
functions.docstring: Commands handle messages with multiple recipients correctly.

functions.name: test_acks_commands_exact_agent_name
functions.docstring: Agent names are matched exactly (case-sensitive).
